destinations.name: Goa
destinations.description: India's beach paradise with Portuguese heritage, vibrant nightlife, and stunning coastline

places.name: Baga Beach
places.description: Famous beach with water sports, beach shacks, and vibrant nightlife. Best for water sports and parties.

places.name: Calangute Beach
places.description: Queen of beaches with clean shores, shops and restaurants nearby.

places.name: Dudhsagar Falls
places.description: Spectacular four-tiered waterfall, one of India's tallest. Jeep safari through jungle.

places.name: Fort Aguada
places.description: 17th-century Portuguese fort offering panoramic views of the Arabian Sea.

places.name: Anjuna Flea Market
places.description: Wednesday market with handicrafts, clothes, spices and local goods.

places.name: Chapora Fort
places.description: Iconic fort featured in Dil Chahta Hai, stunning sunset views.

places.name: Scuba Diving at Grande Island
places.description: Explore vibrant coral reefs and marine life with professional instructors.

places.name: Spice Plantation Tour
places.description: Guided tour through cardamom, pepper and cashew plantations with lunch.

places.name: Old Goa Churches
places.description: UNESCO World Heritage churches including Basilica of Bom Jesus.

places.name: Vagator Beach
places.description: Secluded rocky beach with cliffs, less crowded, perfect for sunsets.

hotels.name: Zostel Goa
hotels.description: Popular backpacker hostel with great social vibe

hotels.name: Park Hyatt Goa
hotels.description: 5-star luxury resort with private beach access

hotels.name: Treebo Trend Goa Beach House
hotels.description: Comfortable mid-range hotel near Calangute beach

hotels.name: The Hideout Hostel
hotels.description: Chill budget hostel near Anjuna beach

hotels.name: Wildflower Boutique
hotels.description: Boutique hotel with beautiful pool and garden

transport.description: AC taxi for full day sightseeing

destinations.name: Manali
destinations.description: Himalayan paradise for adventure seekers with snow-capped peaks, river rafting and skiing

places.name: Rohtang Pass
places.description: Snow-covered high-altitude pass at 3978m. Stunning views, snow activities.

places.name: Solang Valley
places.description: Skiing, zorbing, paragliding, cable car rides with Himalayan backdrop.

places.name: Hadimba Temple
places.description: Ancient 16th-century wooden temple in cedar forest, peaceful atmosphere.

places.name: Beas River Rafting
places.description: Thrilling white water rafting on grade 3-4 rapids through rocky gorges.

places.name: Old Manali
places.description: Charming old town with cafes, shops, Manu Temple, backpacker vibe.

places.name: Kullu Valley Viewpoint
places.description: Panoramic views of apple orchards and snow peaks.

places.name: Jogini Waterfall Trek
places.description: Easy to moderate 4km trek through pine forests to a beautiful waterfall.

places.name: Naggar Castle
places.description: Medieval castle converted to heritage hotel with valley views.

hotels.name: The Hosteller Manali
hotels.description: Top-rated backpacker hostel in Old Manali

hotels.name: Span Resort & Spa
hotels.description: Luxury resort on Beas riverbank

hotels.name: Snow Valley Resorts
hotels.description: Comfortable hotel with mountain views

hotels.name: Zostel Manali
hotels.description: Social hostel perfect for solo travelers

transport.description: Delhi to Manali Volvo bus one way

destinations.name: Jaipur
destinations.description: The Pink City with magnificent forts, palaces, vibrant bazaars and royal Rajasthani culture

places.name: Amber Fort
places.description: Magnificent hilltop fort with intricate architecture, elephant rides, light show.

places.name: Hawa Mahal
places.description: Iconic Palace of Winds with 953 windows, best viewed at sunrise from opposite cafe.

places.name: City Palace
places.description: Royal palace complex with museum, courtyards, and stunning Rajput architecture.

places.name: Nahargarh Fort
places.description: Hilltop fort with panoramic city views, spectacular at sunset.

places.name: Johari Bazaar
places.description: Famous jewelry and gemstone market, also sarees, bangles, Rajasthani handicrafts.

places.name: Jal Mahal
places.description: Water Palace floating in Man Sagar Lake, best seen from the road during sunrise/sunset.

places.name: Jantar Mantar
places.description: UNESCO World Heritage astronomical observatory with giant instruments.

hotels.name: Moustache Jaipur
hotels.description: Best budget hostel in Jaipur with pool and rooftop views

hotels.name: Rambagh Palace
hotels.description: Former royal palace, most iconic luxury hotel

hotels.name: Hotel Pearl Palace
hotels.description: Excellent value hotel with award-winning rooftop restaurant

hotels.name: Zostel Jaipur
hotels.description: Well-located budget hostel

transport.description: AC cab for full day sightseeing

destinations.name: Kerala
destinations.description: God's Own Country with backwaters, tea plantations, elephants and Ayurvedic traditions

places.name: Alleppey Backwaters
places.description: Overnight houseboat on Kerala backwaters with meals included, unforgettable experience.

places.name: Munnar Tea Gardens
places.description: Rolling hills covered with tea plantations, tea museum, Eravikulam National Park.

places.name: Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary
places.description: Boat safari on Periyar Lake to spot elephants, tigers, bison in natural habitat.

places.name: Fort Kochi
places.description: Historic port area with Chinese fishing nets, synagogue, Dutch Palace, cafes.

places.name: Varkala Beach
places.description: Clifftop beach with mineral springs, yoga shacks, and stunning sunsets.

places.name: Kathakali Show
places.description: Traditional Kerala dance drama with elaborate costumes and makeup.

hotels.name: Marari Beach Backpackers
hotels.description: Budget stay near pristine beach

hotels.name: Kumarakom Lake Resort
hotels.description: Award-winning luxury resort on backwaters

hotels.name: Zostel Kochi
hotels.description: Great location in historic Fort Kochi

hotels.name: Fragrant Nature Resort
hotels.description: Beautiful resort amid tea gardens

destinations.name: Udaipur
destinations.description: City of Lakes — the most romantic city in India with palaces, lakes and rich culture

places.name: City Palace
places.description: Largest palace complex in Rajasthan overlooking Lake Pichola with amazing museum.

places.name: Lake Pichola Boat Ride
places.description: Evening boat ride to Lake Palace hotel with sunset views, magical experience.

places.name: Saheliyon Ki Bari
places.description: Garden of Maidens with fountains, lotus pools and marble pavilions.

places.name: Jagdish Temple
places.description: 16th century Indo-Aryan temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu, intricate carvings.

places.name: Bagore Ki Haveli
places.description: Heritage haveli with folk dance shows in the evening, beautiful courtyard.

hotels.name: Zostel Udaipur
hotels.description: Budget stay with stunning lake views

hotels.name: Taj Lake Palace
hotels.description: Island luxury hotel on Lake Pichola

hotels.name: Hill View Guest House
hotels.description: Value hotel with rooftop lake views

destinations.name: Shimla
destinations.description: Queen of Hill Stations with colonial architecture, toy train and panoramic Himalayan views

places.name: Mall Road
places.description: Iconic promenade with shops, restaurants, ice cream parlors and stunning views.

places.name: Jakhu Temple & Trek
places.description: 2.5km trek to highest peak in Shimla, Hanuman temple, playful monkeys, panoramic views.

places.name: Kufri
places.description: Ski resort 13km from Shimla, snow activities, yak rides, adventure park.

places.name: Toy Train (Kalka-Shimla)
places.description: UNESCO World Heritage narrow gauge railway through tunnels and viaducts.

hotels.name: Zostel Shimla
hotels.description: Best budget option with great views

hotels.name: Wildflower Hall Oberoi
hotels.description: Former home of Lord Kitchener, luxury resort

hotels.name: Hotel Combermere
hotels.description: Colonial-era heritage hotel on Mall Road

travel_tips: Always carry valid government ID for hotel check-ins
Book accommodation in advance during peak season (Oct-Feb for most destinations)
Use UPI apps like PhonePe or Google Pay - widely accepted across India
Download offline maps before visiting hill stations
Carry cash as ATMs can be scarce in remote areas
Bargain at local markets - start at 50% of quoted price
Respect local customs - dress modestly at religious sites
Try street food but stick to freshly cooked items
Book train tickets 30-60 days in advance using IRCTC
Weather can change rapidly in mountains - carry layered clothing
